title: Headsup: "hosting" button is deprecated from the Developer Center
excerpt:
Hey Developers, 
Just a heads-up: The “Hosting” page has been deprecated in the Developer Center and is being merged with the “Features” page. 
No action is required on your end. 
Cheers, 
Omer

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Developers,
Just a heads-up: The “Hosting” page has been deprecated in the Developer Center and is being merged with the “Features” page.
No action is required on your end.

Cheers,
Omer

posts.author: asplundsoftware (Brad)
posts.cookedHtml:
What is the workflow to setup/connect hosting now?

There is not a clear path from the “features” page to how to connect to monday code, and the docs at Get started are still referencing the standalone “hosting” page.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @asplundsoftware,

You can find everything about monday code here!

You can also find Github quickstarts here
